% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usepackage{quiver}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}[ampersand replacement=\&]
	{\mathsf{C}} \&\& {\mathsf{D}} \&\& {\mathsf{E}}
	\arrow[""{name=0, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "F", curve={height=-12pt}, from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow[""{name=1, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "G"', curve={height=12pt}, from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow[""{name=2, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "H", curve={height=-12pt}, from=1-3, to=1-5]
	\arrow[""{name=3, anchor=center, inner sep=0}, "K"', curve={height=12pt}, from=1-3, to=1-5]
	\arrow["\alpha", between={0.2}{0.8}, Rightarrow, from=0, to=1]
	\arrow["\beta", between={0.2}{0.8}, Rightarrow, from=2, to=3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
